fix_code:
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.next = None
        self.prev = None
        self.val = val

class dll:
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = None
        self.tail = None
        self.length = 0

    def append(self, val):
        new = Node(val)
        if not self.head:
            self.head = new
            self.tail = new
            self.length += 1
            return
        self.tail.next = new
        new.prev = self.tail
        self.tail = new
        self.length += 1

    def __str__(self):
        curr = self.head
        res = str()
        if not self.head:
            return "Linked list is empty"
        while curr is not None:
            res += str(curr.val)
            # Add separator only if there is a next node
            # The original error was that curr was already advanced to None before this check
            if curr.next is not None:
                res += ' <-> '
            curr = curr.next
        return res

ll = dll()
ll.append(10)
ll.append(30)
print(ll)
